criteria: Exactly one topic resolved from the routes.json enum
Exactly one references/<topic>.md playbook read (not the cluster)
Playbook acceptance and quality criteria satisfied
Deterministic scripts/validators run and result recorded
Least-privilege tokens (top-level read, per-job reasoned widening)
No secret values embedded; OIDC or name-only references
No deploy from PR/unprotected branch; no untrusted input in run:
Rollback path chosen and tested in staging pre-deploy
Migrations expand/contract-safe; no destructive change this release
Risk tier set; high-risk forces canary and longer monitoring
Behavior evidence captured; green build not treated as proof
Every claim evidence-tagged; no secrets/prices/PII; single brand

gate: All dimensions must be 'pass' (no 'fail') for the deliverable to be done.
